name: shannon
description: Shannon — Claude Code plugin for high-stakes multi-stage agentic work. Iron Rule: real-system evidence on disk, refuses verdicts without proof. Embedded sub-agent skills (sub-agents carry their skills, can't fail to load). Standalone — no required MCP servers; Context7 and sequential-thinking recommended.

context7.purpose: Fresh library/API documentation for prompt-engineering + research skills

sequential-thinking.purpose: Systematic problem decomposition for planning + root-cause skills
